## What's Changed

- Added an optional Channel 01 switch to Tube TV's General settings.
- Allowed custom channels to reserve channel 01 when the setting is enabled.
- Kept Channel 01 disabled by default for the US channel plan.
- Kept automatically generated channels starting at channel 02.
- Avoided creating a blank channel 01 when the option is enabled without a custom channel assigned to it.
- Added API, validation, numbering, and frontend coverage for the new setting.

## Player Compatibility

Use Tater Tube Player v1.5.5 or newer to place the scrolling Tater Guide on channel 999 and expose a server-defined channel 01.

## Upgrade

Pull the latest container and restart:

```bash
docker pull ghcr.io/tatertotterson/tater-tube-server:latest
docker restart tater-tube-server
```

No configuration migration is required. Channel 01 remains off until enabled in Tube TV settings.
